entries.lesson: Green CI is not production-shaped proof; test Git and archive roots; do not assume .git.
existingEvidence: tests/rolloutImplementationEvidence.test.ts exercises both a Git checkout and a source archive without .git.
phase0Evidence: tests/rankingRestartBaseline.test.ts proves identical explicit commit semantics in Git and archive roots and a strict failure when neither explicit/environment nor Git identity exists.
entries.rationale: The Phase 0 capture path no longer assumes .git and the existing rollout implementation evidence already has a production-shaped archive fixture.
entries.followup: Keep Git/archive parity in every later evidence producer.

entries.lesson: Full replay is a separate ~2GB workload; distinct probe/append/bootstrap/audit envelopes and honest measurement.
existingEvidence: The current worker and raw-source child both declare a 2048 MB old-space ceiling and tests bind entry points to that policy.
phase0Evidence: ops/ranking-restart/baseline-receipt.json freezes the current deployment and cadence without claiming an incremental memory target.
entries.rationale: Current code has an honest full-workload ceiling but does not yet define and prove distinct production envelopes for probe, append, bootstrap, and audit.
entries.followup: Add path-specific resource budgets and production measurements in the later resource-budget phase.

entries.lesson: Authority includes failure semantics; discriminated child states with explicit required/optional artifacts; real absent-file/provider fixtures.
existingEvidence: Early terminal refresh outcomes publish immutable success, skipped, or failure evidence and missing storage fails closed.
phase0Evidence: scripts/ranking-restart-baseline.mjs uses a strict present/absent full-audit union and records verified live absence instead of fabricating an audit receipt.
entries.rationale: Phase 0 represents audit absence exactly, but a complete child-state outcome matrix with production absent-provider fixtures is deferred.
entries.followup: Specify and test the authoritative outcome matrix in the next contract phase.

entries.lesson: Recovery needs narrow override; scheduled freshness stays strict; verified-raw rebuild requires force + separate recovery authorization.
existingEvidence: Scheduled refresh cadence and freshness checks currently fail closed; manual force exists but is not a separate recovery authorization.
phase0Evidence: ops/ranking-restart/baseline-receipt.json records previous-complete-generation first and requires both force and recovery-authorization for verified-raw replay.
entries.rationale: Phase 0 documents the required recovery contract but is explicitly unauthorized to introduce the recovery override.
entries.followup: Implement the separate recovery authorization only in the approved fresh/recovery/stale phase.

entries.lesson: Published movement is not causal match impact; explanations come from causal per-series engine output.
existingEvidence: Ranking explanations are produced from series-engine causal outputs rather than inferred only from published movement.
phase0Evidence: ops/ranking-restart/baseline-receipt.json binds the live model/config and producing code without changing explanation semantics.
entries.rationale: Current code has a causal per-series explanation path with direct regression coverage.
entries.followup: Preserve semantic equality of causal explanation artifacts in all later incremental mutation tests.

entries.lesson: Publication is transactional; immutable objects/state/receipts first, reassert fencing, active pointer last; immutable receipt members only.
existingEvidence: Content-addressed objects and state are verified before promotion, but uploadRankingArtifacts promotes active-generation.json before publishGenerationReceipt writes generations/<id>/publish.json.
phase0Evidence: tests/rankingRestartBaseline.test.ts requires active and previous publish receipt presence or verified absence to be explicit and binds that result without mutating publication.
entries.rationale: A crash after pointer promotion and before publish receipt completion can expose a generation whose publish receipt is absent.
entries.followup: Move immutable receipt completion before a final fenced active-pointer CAS in the atomic-publication phase.

entries.lesson: Correctness covers local-only, upload-disabled, content-addressed full, patch, no-data.
existingEvidence: Current integration and patch suites cover full and incremental publication paths, including no-change behavior.
phase0Evidence: Phase 0 changes no publication defaults and tests prohibit publication or deletion commands from its read-only inspector.
entries.rationale: One matrix proving semantic equivalence across local-only, upload-disabled, content-addressed full, patch, and no-data modes does not yet exist.
entries.followup: Add the complete publication-mode outcome matrix before incremental activation.

entries.lesson: Artifact dependencies need typed domain evidence including tournament invalidation and endpoint-state ratings.
existingEvidence: The typed dependency graph covers tournament movement artifacts and the classifier has tournament/context invalidation cases.
phase0Evidence: The baseline binds every active public artifact plus state checkpoints to the exact model/config authority.
entries.rationale: Typed dependencies exist, but complete domain evidence for endpoint-state ratings and every tournament invalidation consumer remains unproven.
entries.followup: Close dependency coverage in the later typed-artifact-dependencies phase.

entries.lesson: Rollout evidence measures the exact gate; one canonical schema/path resolver across CLI/runtime/runbook/tests/cost; audit success exact zero-mutation/full-comparison.
existingEvidence: Rollout evidence has a canonical schema and early terminal receipts, but multiple consumers still independently resolve parts of the gate.
phase0Evidence: scripts/ranking-restart-baseline.mjs provides one strict baseline receipt parser/path and records exact full-audit absence.
entries.rationale: Seven-day rollout evidence and exact zero-mutation/full-comparison audit success are explicitly later-phase work.
entries.followup: Unify gate resolution and collect seven immutable days before activation.

entries.lesson: Large stacked PRs hide risk; one current-main contract PR with production-shaped test at a time.
existingEvidence: The restart baseline is a single current-main Phase 0 contract change and later phases are not included.
phase0Evidence: tests/rankingRestartBaseline.test.ts verifies this ledger contains exactly the ten approved lessons in order.
entries.rationale: This restart follows the required one-invariant Phase 0 slice and records later work without implementing it.
entries.followup: Merge and independently review Phase 0 before opening the next current-main contract PR.
